title: Stage 11 – Vendor Reviews & Ratings (Next Part)

requirements.text: Implement average rating display on the VendorCard/VendorDirectoryPage: compute and show a star rating badge (average of all reviews) for each vendor in the directory listing, using the existing review data from the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Each vendor card in the VendorDirectoryPage displays an average star rating (1–5) computed from their reviews
If a vendor has no reviews, display a 'No reviews yet' indicator instead of a rating
Rating is visually represented with filled/empty stars or a numeric badge consistent with the existing design system

requirements.text: Add average rating and review count display to the VendorStorePage public storefront header, pulling data from the existing reviews query so visitors can see the vendor's overall rating at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: VendorStorePage header/hero section shows the vendor's average star rating and total review count
Data is derived from the same reviews query already used by VendorReviewsSection
Display updates reactively when new reviews are submitted

requirements.text: Add backend support for retrieving all reviews for a given vendor as an aggregate (average rating + count) via a dedicated query function, so the frontend can efficiently fetch summary stats without loading full review objects for listing pages.
acceptanceCriteria: A new query function (e.g., getVendorRatingSummary) accepts a vendor ID and returns the average rating and total review count
Returns a Result or optional record with averageRating (Float) and reviewCount (Nat)
Existing review storage and submission logic is unchanged

requirements.text: Expose the new getVendorRatingSummary backend query in useQueries.ts as a React Query hook (e.g., useVendorRatingSummary(vendorId)), and use it in VendorDirectoryPage and VendorStorePage for displaying aggregate rating stats.
acceptanceCriteria: useVendorRatingSummary hook is added to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts
Hook accepts a vendorId parameter and returns averageRating and reviewCount
Hook is consumed by VendorDirectoryPage vendor cards and VendorStorePage header

requirements.text: Add a sortable 'Rating' column/option to VendorDirectoryPage so users can sort vendors by their average rating (highest-rated first), leveraging the existing sort controls and vendorDiscovery utility helpers.
acceptanceCriteria: VendorDirectoryPage sort controls include a 'Top Rated' or 'Rating' option alongside existing name/date sorts
Selecting 'Rating' sorts vendors descending by average rating
Sort option syncs to URL params consistent with existing sort param handling

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
Reuse existing review data structures and query patterns already established in the codebase
nonGoals: Rebuilding or replacing the existing VendorReviewsSection review submission form
Adding moderation or flagging of reviews
Paginating reviews on the directory page
